title: More Wood
description: Adds more wood to minecraft. like red blue and green wood.
body:
**More wood:** *Vivid Woods*


*Vivid Woods* brings a splash of color to your Minecraft world by introducing a variety of new wood colors! With this mod, you’ll have access to vibrant red, blue, green, yellow, pink, and even a crisp white wood type, all crafted from trees found throughout your world. Each colored wood type includes planks, stairs, slabs, fences, doors, and other standard wooden items, allowing you to fully customize your builds with fresh, bold aesthetics. Whether you're constructing a colorful village, adding unique accents, or creating themed builds, *Vivid Woods* provides the perfect palette to unleash your creativity!
